records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're Swan Claire, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're Swan Claire, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know who you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know who you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's best for you to listen to my words if you want to live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were a cunning actress, but it turns out that you're just a little girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were a cunning actress, but it turns out that you're just a little girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were a cunning actress, but it turns out that you're just a little girl.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You made a mistake, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Midnight Killer is out loose in the city looking for prey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Midnight Killer is out loose in the city looking for prey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Midnight Killer is out loose in the city looking for prey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So another body on the streets doesn't change anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So another body on the streets doesn't change anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So another body on the streets doesn't change anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone will think that another poor girl fell victim to a crazy killer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone will think that another poor girl fell victim to a crazy killer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone will think that another poor girl fell victim to a crazy killer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why aren't you saying anything? Cat got your tongue?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why aren't you saying anything? Cat got your tongue?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, tell me the truth unless you want to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, tell me the truth unless you want to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless I want to die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless I want to die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless I want to die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. Wouldn't it be you who'll be in trouble if I die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That stiff and overbearing tone you use to order around your subordinates...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That stiff and overbearing tone you use to order around your subordinates...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That stiff and overbearing tone you use to order around your subordinates...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like you were in a fairly high position. I'm sure there used to be many under you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like you were in a fairly high position. I'm sure there used to be many under you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But your right hand is trembling slightly. I assume you injured the nerves in your hand in the western front?

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how did you know that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It truly is a pity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It truly is a pity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It truly is a pity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A patriot risks his life for his country, then ends up as an errand boy for some high-ranking official.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A patriot risks his life for his country, then ends up as an errand boy for some high-ranking official.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A patriot risks his life for his country, then ends up as an errand boy for some high-ranking official.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know your <color=#ffd34c>client</color> better than you think.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I know your <color=#ffd34c>client</color> better than you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, he wants things to be done as quietly as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, he wants things to be done as quietly as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, he wants things to be done as quietly as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will be honest with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will be honest with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will be honest with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't have the photo he demands with me right now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have the photo he demands with me right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I did take steps to make sure it would naturally get leaked if anything happened to me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But I did take steps to make sure it would naturally get leaked if anything happened to me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If I die, the situation he wants to avoid will happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I suggest you go back and tell him what I just told you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I suggest you go back and tell him what I just told you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That if he's that afraid of this scandal, he should be more generous.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That if he's that afraid of this scandal, he should be more generous.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't make me laugh! Why should I trust the words of a little girl?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, proving that will be easy enough.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, it's such an honor as an actress for such a gentleman to support me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I do. I remember all my fans' faces.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a fan, of course.

root.m_Talk_FRA: As a fan, of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure if I understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure if I understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure if I understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I appreciate your kindness, but this is my personal waiting room.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I appreciate your kindness, but this is my personal waiting room.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although I'm grateful, I'll have to decline. Please go back.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Although I'm grateful, I'll have to decline. Please go back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so? What a shame.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so? What a shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't be able to deliver this <color=#ffd34c>letter</color> to its owner.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't be able to deliver this <color=#ffd34c>letter</color> to its owner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's that fan letter...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How do you have it...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How do you have it...?!
